name: Amazon.com, Inc.
lede: Amazon runs eight centers across six Indian cities. Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune and Gurugram, covering GBS, SSC and IT, built over 22 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Amazon office in India. We map eight, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Amazon.com, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Amazon runs 8 verified centers across 6 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune, Gurugram), covering GBS, SSC and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

titles.title: Country Head, Amazon Flex & IHS India
Head - Data & Analytics, India and South Asia
VP, (HR) People eXperience and Technology, Amazon Stores India and Emerging Markets

about.description: Amazon's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Pune and Gurugram, spanning GBS, SSC and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 52 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Amazon operate in India?
faq.a: Amazon operates 8 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Amazon have centers in?
faq.a: Amazon's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 5 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Amazon run in India?
faq.a: Amazon runs GBS and 2 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Amazon's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Amazon's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Amazon's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Amazon's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
